description: MCP Lifecycle Manager v1 — declares lifecycle state for every MCP server, rules for each state, and per-MCP configuration. This policy is the authoritative source for MCP lifecycle decisions. Conformance guards enforce it.

enabled.description: MCP is enabled in the baseline (global + workspace) config and expected to be connected at runtime.

disabled.description: MCP is disabled in all configs. Not expected to be running.

requires_service.description: MCP requires an external service (local or remote) to function. Disabled until the service is restored. Must not be globally enabled without a health check.

deprecated.description: MCP is formally deprecated and should not be used. May be removed from config in a future cleanup.

repo_only.description: MCP is NOT in the baseline (global/workspace) config. Enabled only via repo-level .opencode/opencode.json overlay for repos that need it.

github.purpose: GitHub API access for PR, issue, and repo operations

playwright.purpose: Browser automation for UI verification, visual QA, screenshot evidence
playwright.notes: Disabled in baseline. Enabled via repo-level overlay in ui_ux repos: protected-repo-prod, example-app, example-orchestrator-PROD, demo-project, example-dashboard. Must NOT appear in global config.

pencil.purpose: Pencil design tool for UI/UX design iteration
pencil.notes: Not in baseline config. Enabled via repo-level overlay in ui_ux repos. Must NOT appear in global config.

firecrawl.purpose: Heavy web crawl and deep search
firecrawl.notes: Disabled everywhere. May be enabled task-based for research profile in the future.

web-tools.purpose: Formerly: workspace remote web-tools MCP at http://127.0.0.1:8787/mcp
web-tools.reason: No service code, no MCP endpoint, no unique capability, no startup script. Port 8787 was originally the demo-project API server default port, not a dedicated web-tools MCP port. The demo-project server has no /mcp endpoint. web-tools was a misconfiguration that produced a startup failure on every OpenCode launch.
web-tools.notes: DEPRECATED (2026-07-01). Removed from all active config/profile/guard surfaces. Capabilities fully covered by exa (web search + page fetch), webfetch (OpenCode built-in URL fetcher), context7 (library docs), github (code search), and playwright (browser automation).

global_config.description: Rules for what MCPs are allowed in the global config (~/.config/opencode/opencode.json).

fail_conditions.description: A repo_only MCP (playwright, pencil) appears in the global config.
A requires_service MCP (web-tools) is enabled in global config without a running service health check.
fail_conditions.repair: Run: bash .opencode/scripts/sync-opencode-runtime.sh to disable. Then either restore the service or formally deprecate.

workspace_config.description: Rules for what MCPs are allowed in the workspace config (.opencode/opencode.json).

fail_conditions.description: A deprecated MCP appears in the workspace config.
fail_conditions.repair: Remove the MCP from .opencode/opencode.json and run sync-opencode-runtime.sh

clone_onboarding.description: Rules for when a repo is cloned and mapped to a profile.
clone_onboarding.warning_message: Repo '{repo}' is mapped to ui_ux profile but lacks .opencode/opencode.json. Playwright and pencil MCPs will NOT be available. Create .opencode/opencode.json with playwright + pencil enabled. See demo-project/.opencode/opencode.json for the template.
clone_onboarding.pre_registered_note: These repos are pre-registered in the profile registry but not yet cloned locally. They will need .opencode/opencode.json created when cloned.
